study_name: Phase 1 IVT PCV-25 in Healthy Adults (CVIA 096)
publication_reference: Langley JM et al. Vaccine 75 (2026) 128236. doi:10.1016/j.vaccine.2026.128236
notes: No results posted on ClinicalTrials.gov. Data extracted from publication Tables 4a and 5a. Formulation A: 2.2 mcg per serotype (4.4 mcg for 6B) with 125 mcg aluminium phosphate.

study_name: Phase 2 IVT PCV-25 Dose-Ranging in Healthy Adults (CVIA 105)
publication_reference: Langley JM et al. Vaccine 75 (2026) 128236. doi:10.1016/j.vaccine.2026.128236
arms: PCV25 Formulation A (n=39), PCV25 Formulation B (n=57), PCV25 Formulation C (n=79), PCV20 (n=39)
notes: No results posted on ClinicalTrials.gov. Data extracted from publication Tables 4b-d and 5b-d. Formulation A (2.2/125): 2.2 mcg + 125 mcg alum. Formulation B (2.2/250): 2.2 mcg + 250 mcg alum. Formulation C (4.4/250): 4.4 mcg + 250 mcg alum. PCV20 control shared across formulation comparisons.

study_name: Phase 3 Study of 14-valent PCV (PNEUBEVAX 14) in Healthy Indian Infants
publication_reference: Matur RV et al. Vaccine 42 (2024) 3157-3165. doi:10.1016/j.vaccine.2024.03.056
tables_extracted: Figure 2b (IgG GMC), Table 2 (OPA GMT), Table 4 (6A cross-protection)
arms: BE-PCV-14 (n=641 GMC / n=192 OPA), PCV-13 (n=626 GMC / n=194 OPA)
notes: Not on ClinicalTrials.gov (registered at CTRI India). Phase 3 in 6-8 week old Indian infants. 3+0 schedule (6-10-14 weeks). Includes 22F and 33F unique to BE-PCV-14 and 6A cross-protection from 6B. No individual CIs reported for GMC or OPA values.
